name: Echoes of the Past
intro_text: The Arkham Historical Society maintains archives that stretch back to the city's founding. Hidden within those records — if the whispers are to be believed — is evidence of the Yellow Sign's presence in Arkham going back centuries.
You have broken into the society after hours. The building is dark, the curator absent. But you are not alone.
Something has been here before you, and it has left its mark on every room.
setup_instructions: Investigators begin at the Entry Hall.
Shuffle the 7 Historical Society locations and arrange them face-down around the Entry Hall.
The True Magick tome (03135) is set aside; it is found during the scenario.
Distribute Omen tokens as instructed by the act card.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The secret is uncovered
text: Deep in the archives you find it: a complete record of the Yellow Sign's history in Arkham. Names, dates, rituals. The cult is older than the city itself.
The knowledge is a burden. But it is also a weapon.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators uncovered the secret history. Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — Partial records recovered
text: You escaped with what you could carry. Some pages were burned, some stolen by the thing that stalked the halls. But you have enough to continue.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators recovered partial records. Each investigator earns 1 bonus XP.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Lost in the archives
text: The shelves close around you. The entries in the books are changing — and one of them is about you.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at Echoes of the Past.*
